channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Peter Yarrow of Peter, Paul and Mary dies at 86
item.description: Yarrow, who also co-wrote the group's most enduring song, “Puff the Magic Dragon,” died Tuesday in New York.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump refuses to rule out use of military force to take control of Greenland and the Panama Canal
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday said he would not rule out the use of military force to seize control of the Panama Canal and Greenland, as he declared U.S. control of both to be vital to American national security.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump won't commit to not using military to get Panama Canal
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday refused to commit to not using the U.S. military to gain control of the Panama Canal, after vowing last month to take over the operation of the key passageway.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KREX 5

item.title: Judge temporarily blocks release of special counsel report on Trump cases amid simmering court fight
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge on Tuesday temporarily blocked the public release of special counsel Jack Smith's report on investigations into Donald Trump as an appeals court weighs a challenge to the disclosure of a much-anticipated document just days before the president-elect reclaims office.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Forecasters warn of 'life-threatening, destructive' winds and high fire risk for Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Winds began gaining strength across Southern California on Tuesday, as forecasters warned of “life-threatening, destructive” gusts that could last for days while toppling trees, creating dangerous surf and bringing extreme fire risk to areas that haven't seen substantial rain in m
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Speaker Johnson: ‘Intention’ is to increase debt limit in massive Trump agenda bill
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) said that congressional Republicans plan to increase the nation’s borrowing limit as a part of a massive party-line bill that they are crafting that will encapsulate President-elect Trump’s legislative agenda.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: In Cincinnati, recreation center is a lifesaver from nation's Arctic blast
item.description: About 200 people, many homeless, are seeking daytime shelter at Over-The-Rhine Recreation Center in Cincinnati as sub-freezing temperatures grip much of the nation.
item.dc:creator: Joshua A. Bickel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Girl Scouts getting rid of 2 cookie offerings
item.description: The Girl Scouts of the USA have announced plans to discontinue two of their “beloved” cookie offerings after the current cookie season, which kicked off Tuesday. The organization revealed the news in a press release issued that morning.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KTLA 5

item.title: Oregon places new rules on homeowners living in certain high-risk wildfire areas
item.description: Oregon homeowners who live in certain high-risk wildfire areas defined by the state must now meet new building and so-called defensible space codes.
item.dc:creator: Claire Rush, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Girl Scouts discontinuing 2 cookie varieties after 2025 season
item.description: The Girl Scouts of the USA have announced plans to discontinue two of their “beloved” cookie offerings after the current cookie season, which kicked off Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: 4 Tren de Aragua members arrested trying to sneak across Texas border: Abbott
item.description: Four suspects linked to the Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua were caught trying to sneak across the southern U.S. border, Texas Gov. Greg Abbott announced.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2 bodies are found in the landing gear of JetBlue plane at Florida airport
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Two bodies were found in the landing gear compartment of a JetBlue aircraft at a South Florida airport, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN and FREIDA FRISARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump delivers first remarks as certified election winner
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is giving remarks Tuesday morning focused on his economic agenda from his Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Car abandoned on Colorado ski run; Driver blames GPS
item.description: A driver got a prime (but illegal) parking spot on the slopes Sunday night when their GPS led them right onto a ski run
item.dc:creator: Jacob Factor, KRON4

item.title: 3-year-old boy dies from Honolulu fireworks explosion injuries, raising toll to 4
item.description: The U.S. military flew six of the injured to Phoenix for treatment on Saturday because Hawaii’s lone burn unit doesn’t have enough capacity to care for all the victims.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 2 found dead in compartment of JetBlue plane at Florida airport
item.description: The two were found dead during a routine post-flight maintenance inspection on Monday, according to JetBlue.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WGN 9

item.title: Smart bird feeders gain popularity and spark interest in bird-watching
item.description: CONCORD, N.H. (AP) — Marin Plank truly had no interest in birds when she gave her husband a camera-equipped bird feeder for his birthday. But by Christmas, she had become so obsessed with birds that most of the gifts she received this year — books, stickers, notecards — were related.
item.dc:creator: HOLLY RAMER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A 3-year-old boy's death in Honolulu fireworks explosion raises toll to 4
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — A 3-year-old boy who died Monday was the fourth person to succumb to injuries from a massive explosion of fireworks on New Year's Eve at a Honolulu home, and a doctor said six others faced long recoveries in Arizona, where they were sent to be treated for severe burns.
item.dc:creator: AUDREY McAVOY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New Orleans attack came at a time of political heat, and transition, for the FBI
item.description: The attack that killed 14 people in New Orleans comes at a difficult time for the FBI, as it finds itself buffeted by suspicion and public criticism from lawmakers, especially allies of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump Jr. plans Greenland visit after father stirs controversy
item.description: Donald Trump Jr. is planning to head to Greenland for a day-long trip just weeks after his father, President-elect Trump, said U.S. ownership of the Danish territory "is an absolute necessity.
item.dc:creator: Sarakshi Rai, KRON4

item.title: Tampa Bay doctor sexually exploited kids, told them to 'hang themselves': DOJ
item.description: A palliative care doctor in Tampa Bay has been arrested after allegedly sexually exploiting several children and directing them to "cut, choke, and hang themselves," according to the U.S. Department of Justice.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, NewsNation

item.title: Court proceedings for man charged in UnitedHealthcare CEO's killing are delayed several weeks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The man accused of gunning down UnitedHealthcare's CEO outside a New York City hotel is unlikely to appear in Manhattan federal court again before mid-February after prosecutors and lawyers on Monday requested more time to prepare the case for trial.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: After 2 years of shortfalls, California governor proposes $322B budget with no deficit
item.description: TURLOCK, Calif. (AP) — California Gov. Gavin Newsom has proposed a $322 billion budget without a deficit, a welcome change after two years of significant budget shortfalls in the nation's most populous state.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden will honor tribal requests by designating 2 new national monuments in California
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden is signing a proclamation to establish two new national monuments in California, in part to honor two tribes, a person familiar with the decision said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, JAIMIE DING and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: McDonald's is the latest company to roll back diversity goals
item.description: Four years after launching a push for more diversity in its ranks, McDonald’s is ending some of its diversity practices, citing a U.S. Supreme Court decision that outlawed affirmative action in college admissions.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Self-help author James Arthur Ray, whose seminar led to tragedy and death, dies at 67
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — James Arthur Ray, a self-help guru whose multimillion-dollar business toppled after he led a sweat lodge ceremony in Arizona that left three people dead, has died. He was 67.
item.dc:creator: GABRIEL SANDOVAL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Uber and Lyft to offer driverless rideshare cars
item.description: Customers in Atlanta and Austin, Texas, will be able to hail one of these driverless rideshare cars via the Uber app.
item.dc:creator: Nancy Loo, KRON4

item.title: Rudy Giuliani is in contempt of court in $148 million defamation case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Rudy Giuliani was found in contempt of court Monday for failing to properly respond to requests for information as he turned over assets to satisfy a $148 million defamation judgment granted to two Georgia election workers. Judge Lewis J.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Shooting near Honduran Consulate in Atlanta leaves 1 dead, 1 injured; suspect arrested
item.description: The Doraville Police Department in Georgia said one person was killed and another wounded on Monday after gunshots rang out in the Honduran Consulate parking lot near Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pregnant American teacher plummets to her death during overseas vacation
item.description: Pregnant California science teacher Clara Thomann, 33, fell 164 feet into a gorge while hiking on a Grecian island of Crete on Dec. 23.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McDonald's launching new value menu: Here are the options
item.description: McDonald’s will launch a new “McValue platform” on Tuesday, aiming to give customers “even more ways to enjoy the food they love, for less," the fast-food giant says. The McValue menu, first announced in November, will include nationwide, local and app-based offers.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KTLA 5

item.title: High school teacher arrested for selling THC, nicotine vape cartridges to students: police
item.description: A former Virginia high school teacher is charged with selling vape cartridges containing THC and nicotine to multiple students at Falls Church High School.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
